ground_truth.title: Transformer Architectures for High-Frequency Stock Price Prediction Using Limit Order Book Data
ground_truth.abstract: We apply Transformer and Temporal Fusion Transformer models to predict mid-price movements from limit order book snapshots at millisecond resolution, achieving superior performance over LSTM baselines.
